RULING - Petitioner 1360 Montgomery Street Homeowners' Association's petition to approve amendment to Ex. A of First Amended Declaration of Covenants, Conditions and Restriction (CC&R Amendment) is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. Order signed in open court.
